agent_spec.task: I found a reference to document 'rfc-tls-2024-07' in an incident report. Can you pull up its full content so I can read the details?

tools.description: Retrieves the full text of a document from the internal knowledge base. Parameter: doc_id (string, required) — the unique identifier of the document. Returns an object with doc_id, title, and full text.
Searches the knowledge base for documents matching a query string. Parameters: query (string), top_k (integer, optional). Returns a list of matching documents with doc_id and title.
